text: Bahar se wapas aakar yahan ke restricted mahaul mein mera dum ghut-ta hai, par dost ki shaadi miss hone par maine bas thakan ka bahana kiya taaki Mummy-Papa ko bura na lage. Main nahi chahti ki unhe lage ki unki beti NRI lifestyle ki wajah se 'bigad' gayi hai ya India mein adjust nahi kar paa rahi. Ghar ki shanti aur 'izzat' bachane ke liye main apne is akelepan aur alienation ko hamesha chhupaye rakhti hoon.

Dadi ki caregiving mein poori raat nikal gayi aur main shaadi mein nahi ja saki, par asli wajah wo culture shock hai jisne mujhe gher rakha hai. Main apni struggle kisi ko nahi batati kyunki biradari mein log kahenge ki NRI hokar nakhre kar rahi hai, aur main Papa ki 'shaan' mein koi kami nahi aane dena chahti. Parivaar ki harmony ke liye main bas muskurati hoon, bhale hi andar se main bilkul misfit mehsus karun.

Yahan ki safety concerns aur bhasha ka badlav mujhe bilkul pardesi mehsus karata hai, par shaadi miss hone par maine chup-chap saas-bahu wale kalesh se bachne ke liye thakan ka naam liya. Agar maine bataya ki main yahan khush nahi hoon, toh Mummy-Papa ko lagega ki unki itni saalon ki mehnat bekaar gayi. Unke garv aur ghar ki 'maryada' ke liye main apne saare aansu pee kar bas 'theek hoon' kehti hoon.

Studies ke saath shaadi ka dabaav aur caregiving ne mujhe itna nichod diya hai ki main dost ke function mein nahi ja paayi, par maine koi shikayat nahi ki. Main nahi chahti ki ghar walon ko lage ki shehar badalne se mera svabhav badal gaya hai, isliye main apni mental health ko neglect karke bas unki khushi ka dhyan rakhti hoon. 'Log kya kahenge' agar NRI beti ne ghar ki zimmedariyon se moonh mod liya, bas yahi soch kar chup rehti hoon.

Wapas India aakar lagta hai jaise main apni hi zameen par ek ajnabi hoon, par ye baat main Mummy ko nahi bol sakti kyunki wo pehle hi meri safety ko lekar pareshan rehti hain. Shaadi na ja paane ka dukh maine daba liya taaki ghar mein koi naya tamasha na ho aur Papa ka mujh par bharosa bana rahe. Main apne return shock aur depression ka 'natak' nahi karna chahti taaki parivaar ki 'izzat' aur harmony bani rahe.
